user_query: I’m assembling a concise Audi lineup catalog for internal documentation. Please: 1) Read the requested categories and output paths from input/models_request.json and the feature emphasis list from input/tech_focus.txt. 2) Create output/catalog.json with this exact structure: { "categories": { "Sedans & Sportbacks": [...], "SUVs & Crossovers": [...], "Performance (RS & S)": [...], "Electric (e-tron)": [...] }, "technology": ["Quattro", "Virtual Cockpit", "MMI", "Matrix LED"], "company": { "parent": "Volkswagen Group", "founded": 1909, "slogan": "Vorsprung durch Technik" }, "generated_at": "<ISO 8601 UTC>" }. For each category, list only the official Audi models using the exact names and formatting as in the Audi lineup (do not expand or rename combined entries; keep names like "A4/A5", include "RS e-tron GT" and "e-tron GT" exactly). 3) Create output/summary.md summarizing all models grouped by category, briefly explaining the four technologies from input/tech_focus.txt in your own words, and including the company parent, founding year, and slogan. Do not include non-Audi brands or models. Use only your knowledge; no external sources.
